blockingIssues.description: VAL-IMG-007 violation: 8 raw tags remain in app/ and components/ directories. Files with remaining tags: components/goods/ProductCard.tsx, app/products/[id]/page.tsx, app/my/orders/page.tsx, app/my/page.tsx, app/my/personal/page.tsx, app/admin/orders/page.tsx, app/admin/users/page.tsx, app/admin/products/page.tsx. The validation assertion requires 'rg " tags with Next.js component throughout the app'.

appliedUpdates.description: Added known issue about empty artistImageUrl in seed data causing latent runtime errors with Next.js Image component in ConcertCard

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance: When a feature description says 'throughout the app' or 'ALL files', workers must use grep/rg to audit the entire codebase for the pattern, not just the files they're already modifying. Example: 'Replace ALL raw tags' means running 'rg "
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature real-product-images-and-seed worker left 8 raw tags because they only replaced tags in files they were already modifying for other reasons, despite the feature description saying 'Replace ALL raw tags... throughout the app'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether standard Tailwind palette colors (e.g., orange-50, red-500) are acceptable alongside custom design tokens, or whether all colors must map to semantic tokens. Currently AGENTS.md says 'ALWAYS use semantic token classes' but sport-specific accent colors (basketball orange, football green) may not have semantic equivalents.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature sports-banners-and-event-images used default Tailwind orange/red colors in BasketballCard (from-orange-50, to-red-50, from-orange-500, to-red-500) because no semantic token existed for basketball-specific theming. These aren't arbitrary hex values but aren't custom tokens either.

rejectedObservations.observation: ConcertCard uses black/80 and black/40 opacity variants in gradient overlay classes. Pattern not explicitly blessed in AGENTS.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: Standard Tailwind opacity modifiers on named colors are not arbitrary hex values. They follow Tailwind's built-in syntax and are commonly used for overlays. The AGENTS.md rule targets arbitrary hex like text-[#0066FF], not named color opacity variants.
